title: PacBio (PACB) Q2 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: PacBio registered revenues of $35.5 million in Q2 2022, up 15.9% year-over-year, but missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 0.2%. Adjusted loss per share was 34 cents, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. Instrument revenues for Q2 2022 were $15.6 million, up 9.1% year-over-year; consumables revenues were $14.6 million, up 19.7%; and service and other revenues came in at $5.3 million, up 29.8% year-over-year. Adjusted gross profit rose 19.1% to $16.4 million and adjusted gross margin expanded 124 basis points to 46.2%. Positive aspects included the company continuing to gain from its flagship Sequel system and benefiting from multiple strategic tie-ups over the preceding months. However, PacBio's lower-than-expected revenues and wider-than-expected loss per share in Q2 2022 were disappointing, with lower revenues from China and EMEA being worrying.
